rows.description: Computus Ioannis Conybeare Rectoris a 2do Die Novembris 1730 ad eundem Diem revolutum 1731.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for its accurate transcription of the header text. claude-haiku had significant errors in names and terms ('Cary Deare Beckeris', 'Decim seoluutam').
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description. claude-haiku missed an 'r' in 'Arrearagia'.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Guinear'. claude-haiku misread it as 'Burwear'. Amounts were agreed upon and are correct.
Both extractors correctly identified amounts and the 'ob' (0.5) fraction. Selected gemini-flash for capitalization of 'Long' as it appears to match the ledger's style more closely.

Selected gemini-flash as it correctly identified both the description 'Minhinnet' and the amount (£40). claude-haiku had a completely incorrect description ('Cricklade') and amount (£20) for this row.
Both extractors agreed on amounts. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate transcription of the description 'South Newington Rect.', which claude-haiku misread as 'South Morningon Lect.'.
Both extractors agreed on amounts. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate transcription of the description 'Cudlington Rect:', which claude-haiku misread as 'Ceddington Lect.'.
Full consensus across all fields from both extractors. Values are clear in the image.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Lucas Eaton' and correct amounts (£2 0s 0d). claude-haiku misread the description ('Lear Eajon') and presented incorrect amounts (£14 8s 10d), indicating a misalignment or misreading.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Due Quit Rents' and correct amounts (£14 3s 3d). claude-haiku misread the description ('the out Bents') and amounts (£12 0s 0d).

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Ralph Marshals Carons' and correct amounts (£0 7s 6d). claude-haiku misread the description ('Ralph Chariots Orens') and presented amounts from the previous row, indicating significant misalignment.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate amounts (£10 9s 11d). claude-haiku misread the monetary values (£0 7s 5d), which appears to be amounts from a prior row, indicating continued misalignment.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Caleb alias Lane' and correct amounts (£2 19s 5d). claude-haiku misread the description ('Calcut alias Tane') and presented amounts from the previous row (£10 9s 11d), indicating severe misalignment.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Bannister' and correct amounts (£0 15s 0d). claude-haiku misread the description ('Bannitster') and presented amounts from the previous row (£2 19s 5d), continuing the misalignment.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Seaden - Hall' (including the hyphen) and correct amounts (£1 0s 0d). claude-haiku misread the description ('Sealden Hall') and presented amounts from the previous row (£0 15s 0d).
Both extractors agreed on description. Selected gemini-flash for accurate amounts (£4 12s 11d). claude-haiku presented amounts from the previous row (£1 0s 0d), continuing the misalignment.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Hart Hall' and correct amounts (£1 13s 4d). claude-haiku misread 'Hart' as 'Hast' and presented amounts from the previous row (£4 12s 11d), continuing the misalignment.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Napper' and correct amounts and fraction (£4 1s 8½d). The 'ob' (0.5) fraction is clear in the image. claude-haiku misread 'Napper' as 'Capper', the pence ('6' instead of '8'), and the fraction as 0.75.
Both extractors agreed on amounts. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate transcription of 'Clifton Fenny'. The 'F' is clear in the image, unlike claude-haiku's 'Terry'.
Both extractors agreed on amounts and fraction (0.5 'ob'). Selected gemini-flash for its accurate description 'Brew-House', as opposed to claude-haiku's 'Brew Harie'.
Both extractors agreed on amounts. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate transcription of 'Tretherwen'. claude-haiku misread the description as 'Crittenden'.

Both extractors agreed on amounts. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate transcription of 'In & Lane, Sparkes et Merton'. claude-haiku had significant errors in the description ('Sad lane, Sparkles of Merston').
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description 'Medenham' and correct amounts (£6 13s 4d). claude-haiku misread the description ('Okedenham') and pounds/shillings values (£5 3s).
Both extractors agreed on amounts. Selected gemini-flash for its accurate capitalization 'Buck Gate', which is clearer in the image compared to claude-haiku's 'Back gate'.
